positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a forest scene at sunrise. The composition features strong silhouettes of various deciduous trees and abstract geometric floral patterns that weave between the trunks. The color palette is restricted to deep navy blues, burnt oranges, and creamy off-whites, creating high contrast. The style is Nordic woodcut meets retro mid-century modern, featuring clean lines and solid color blocks. The forest should appear tranquil and magical, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central focus, perfect for repeating pattern placement.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logos, artifacts, noisy, cartoon, painting, sketch, complex details, excessive gradient, low contrast, busy background, bad anatomy
